{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = High Council (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] does not want anyone outside the High [[Council]] to know he visited [[Doctor Nova]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The High [[Council]] is a governing body that [[Starhammer]] may influence by removing those who oppose him.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
